description: Neo-Nazi group based in Pennsylvania, founded in 2001 by five men from Harrisburg. Originally focused on uniting white power skinheads across Pennsylvania, it expanded to multiple chapters and became one of the largest single-state racist skinhead crews in the US. The group organizes white power concerts and family-oriented events, and changed its name from Keystone State Skinheads to Keystone United in 2008.

country_links.evidence_quote: Keystone United , formerly known as the Keystone State Skinheads ( KSS ), is a neo-Nazi group based in Pennsylvania .
country_links.context: The organization is based in Pennsylvania and has chapters in multiple U.S. cities, as well as associates in New Jersey, Maryland, and New York.
